name: Tangy Chicken
recipeIngredient: salt and freshly ground black pepper -- to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the marinade ingredients in a bowl. Add the chicken; toss well.
Cover and refrigerate overnight.
2. Bring chicken to room temperature. Preheat oven to 350°F.
Arrange chicken in a roasting pan; pour marinade over chicken. Bake for 45 minutes,
basting occasionally. Finish cooking on a hot grill, 3 to 4 inches from the heat source (or cook
15 more minutes in the oven).
